subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #052 The Appearance of the Spirit in the Body
subcodes.first_line: The wisdom of the appearance of the spirit in the body is this: the human spirit is a divine trust
subcodes.first_line_orig: حکمت ظهور روح در جسد اینست روح انسانی ودیعهء رحمانیست
subcodes.subjects: @relationship of the soul to the body, @the human soul, @fulfillment of true potential
